theme_archetype.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Tactical Logistics
theme_archetype.rationale: High contrast and absolute clarity are paramount for warehouse operations. The design utilizes a dark navy command sidebar to anchor navigation, paired with a white/light content area for maximum data legibility. Touch-friendly scaling applies to action-heavy screens.

rules.headings: Left-aligned for all operational screens. Tight tracking on large text.
rules.numbers: Use tabular-nums for tables, dashboards, and financial figures.

app_shell.mobile_behavior: Sidebar hidden behind hamburger menu on mobile, off-canvas drawer.

touch_interfaces.operator_screens: For Material Issue and Putaway screens, use list-based card layouts instead of dense data tables on mobile.
touch_interfaces.button_size: Min-height h-14 (56px) for primary actions on operator screens.
touch_interfaces.input_size: Min-height h-12 (48px) for text inputs and dropdowns to prevent missed taps.

cards.style: Flat solid background, 1px subtle border, rounded-lg, no default shadow.
cards.hover: Hover state gets a subtle lift (-translate-y-0.5) and shadow-sm.

header.style: Solid white background, sticky top-0, z-40, border-b border-gray-200.

buttons.primary: bg-[#f59e0b] text-white hover:bg-[#d97706] rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-gray-700 border border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-md

tables.header: bg-gray-50 text-xs uppercase text-gray-700 border-b border-gray-200

forms.input: border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#fcd34d] focus:border-[#f59e0b] transition-all
forms.label: block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1

badges.shape: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 border

feedback.loading: Use subtle skeleton loaders with pulse animation for tables and dashboard widgets rather than full-page spinners.

auth_background.description: Large warehouse interior, used for the login/authentication screen background, should have an overlay of bg-[#1a2744]/80 to match the brand.

empty_state_illustration.description: Shipping containers stacked. Use subtly (low opacity or grayscale) for empty dashboard states or reporting headers.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure amber text (#f59e0b) is only used on very dark or very light backgrounds. Over white, use #d97706 for text to pass WCAG AA.
accessibility_and_testing.focus: All interactive elements must have focus-visible outlines.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All buttons, inputs, tabs, and menu items MUST include role-based data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='sidebar-inventory-link').

instructions_to_main_agent: Set up Tailwind config with the custom colors provided in the colors block.
Use Shadcn components for UI primitives (Tables, Cards, Dialogs, Selects, Forms).
Implement a persistent Layout shell with the #1a2744 sidebar and a white top header.
For the Material Issue and Putaway routes, ensure the interface shifts to large, touch-friendly UI patterns (large cards, h-14 buttons).
Create dynamic color-coded Badges for stock statuses based on the provided status_badges palette.
Implement user roles (Admin, Warehouse Operator, Store In-Charge, Inventory Controller, Auditor, Management Viewer) using context or a centralized store, conditionally rendering navigation links.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'IBM Plex Sans' globally, and 'JetBrains Mono' for SKUs and barcodes.
Use the provided image URLs strictly. The login page must use the auth_background URL with a heavy navy overlay.
Apply data-testid to every clickable element.
